## AGD Checklist

- [ ] `00_agd\agd_en.exe check-all 00_agd\agd_docs --strict` passed
- [ ] (if changed) `00_agd\agd_en.exe check-all 00_agd\examples --strict` passed
- [ ] Every changed `@change` block has both `reason` and `impact`
- [ ] If source/derived mapping changed, `source_doc` and `source_sections` are updated
